title: Residential Support Worker
description:
Residential Support Worker

Supporting children and young people in a residential care setting. You will assist with daily routines, provide emotional support, and ensure safeguarding standards are met.

You will contribute to care planning, maintain a structured environment, and support young people in developing independence and life skills. The role requires commitment to delivering high-quality care and building positive, trusting relationships.
summary: Residential care role supporting young people with routines, safety and development in Leeds.

title: Residential Childcare Support Worker
description:
Residential Childcare Support Worker

Working on a casual or sessional basis supporting children and young people in residential settings. You will provide care, supervision and emotional support while maintaining a safe and structured environment.

The role involves working flexibly across shifts as required, supporting daily routines and contributing to a positive living environment for young people.
summary: Flexible residential childcare role providing support to young people in Leeds.

title: Support Worker
description:
Support Worker

Providing care and support within a residential or supported living environment. Duties include assisting with personal care, supporting daily routines and promoting independence.

You will work closely with individuals to support their wellbeing, ensuring a safe and supportive environment at all times.
summary: Support role assisting individuals with daily routines and independence in Leeds.

title: Complex Care Support Worker
description:
Complex Care Support Worker

Supporting individuals with complex medical needs in their own homes. Responsibilities include personal care, medication support and monitoring health conditions.

You will follow tailored care plans, work alongside healthcare professionals and provide high-quality, consistent care to clients.
summary: Home-based role supporting clients with complex health needs in Leeds.

title: Support Worker
description:
Support Worker

Providing care and support to individuals in their homes, helping with personal care, daily activities and promoting independence.

You will work as part of a care team ensuring clients receive consistent and high-quality support tailored to their needs.
summary: Community-based support role assisting individuals with daily care needs in Huddersfield.

title: Support Worker
description:
Support Worker

Supporting individuals within a residential setting, assisting with daily activities, personal care and promoting independence.

You will help maintain a safe environment and support individuals to achieve positive outcomes in their daily lives.
summary: Residential support role helping individuals with daily routines and independence in Keighley.

title: Night Support Worker
description:
Night Support Worker

Working night shifts supporting individuals in a care setting. Duties include monitoring wellbeing, providing support during the night and ensuring safety.

You will assist with personal care where required and maintain a calm, supportive environment.
summary: Night shift support role ensuring safety and care for residents in Castleford.

title: Support Worker
description:
Support Worker

Providing support within a care environment, assisting individuals with daily activities, personal care and emotional support.

You will help individuals maintain independence and improve their quality of life.
summary: Support role assisting individuals with daily care and wellbeing in Wakefield.

title: Care Support Worker
description:
Care Support Worker

Providing one-to-one care and support, assisting with daily activities, personal care and maintaining independence.

You will build a strong working relationship with the individual, supporting their lifestyle and personal goals.
summary: One-to-one support role helping an individual maintain independence in Huddersfield.

title: Support Worker
description:
Support Worker

Providing care and support in a home or community setting, assisting with daily living tasks and promoting independence.

You will ensure high standards of care and support tailored to individual needs.
summary: Community support role assisting individuals with daily care needs in Elland.
